message: fix: use correct GitHub email in sync workflow
fix: sync workflow targets master branch on website repo
add GitHub Action to sync TODO and commit activity to website repo
fix carplay map: follow user location on connect, traffic enabled, proper camera on init
carplay overhaul: raw numeric values for ETA/distance, maneuvers only rebuild on instruction change, no string parsing
fix carplay: set map view controller as window rootViewController on connect per Apple docs
update TODO with all completed work from this session
remove .claude/skills from repo, add .claude to gitignore
fix: compass shows device magnetometer heading (direction phone faces), not GPS course
fix: compass shows cardinal direction (N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW) based on heading, no rotation
fix: use saved travel time from route planning for ETA instead of 30mph assumption
save turn-by-turn steps at route planning time, use them directly during navigation instead of generating from polyline
debug: add trace logging throughout saved route navigation flow
rewrite NavigationEngine from scratch: unified NavStep model, MKRoute is just an adapter, no dual paths
fix: off-route grace period, wider threshold, custom routes don't trigger Apple reroute
custom routing: saved routes now use own turn-by-turn logic, fully independent from Apple Maps
fix: free-look mode during nav — pan/pinch pauses auto-follow, recenter button to resume
fix: remove duplicate didDisconnect overload and nil coalescing warning in CarPlay
fix: saved route polyline now used for map rendering and position tracking, not just route selection
fix: remove duplicate puck annotation, use single MKUserLocation puck
